action.reasoning: Observation: Best test score is 0.6199 from DINOv2 5-epoch model. More training = worse generalization (domain overfitting). CLIP 10-epoch got 0.4719. Analysis: The pattern is clear - fine-tuning the backbone causes domain overfitting. Strategy: Use DINOv2 with fully frozen backbone (linear probe), only train classification head. This preserves domain-invariant features. Also use weighted sampler + weighted loss for class imbalance. Decision: Rewrite to use DINOv2 with frozen backbone, train only head for 15 epochs, then optionally unfreeze last 2 blocks.
